files.justification: Legacy validation analyzer over the soft limit. Do not grow it; split during the next validation refactor.
Legacy broad plugin analyzer tests over the soft limit. New analyzer tests should be split into focused files.

folders.justification: Legacy monolithic test project folder. New tests should be split into focused subdirectories when practical.

rootFolders.justification: Legacy monolithic test project root predates the project-folder limit. New tests should move into focused subdirectories where practical.
